evaluator_feedback: Deliverables are present and the memo documents the embedded packet, representative formulas, assumptions, and a justified provisional recommendation (BASE for all records). Major issues to address before final acceptance: (1) grader outputs contain inconsistent score fields (artifact_contract_score/ deterministic precheck = 1.0 vs model semantic final_score = 0.7) without clear canonical labeling or explanation; (2) the Excel workbook could not be parsed in the verification environment (openpyxl unavailable), so cell-formula presence and exact computed-value provenance were not programmatically verified; (3) the memo lacks an explicit machine-readable output_schema and a dedicated, enumerated acceptance_checks section that an automated verifier can run; (4) some derived-value row-level citations and a machine-readable snapshot of computed results are not provided, limiting reproducibility of automated checks. Fixing these items will enable full semantic verification and higher semantic score.
label: positive
